text:
It's throughput — how many cycles fit the same window.
7 cycles
143 cycles
ocr_reason: The slide is simple and legible enough for direct reading; OCR is not necessary in triage.

blocks.text: It's throughput — how many cycles fit the same window.
Each square is one development cycle. Run the loop by hand and the grid stays nearly empty; run it agentically and the same window fills in — and every cycle can make the agent better.
